name: Pony Poindexter
abstract: Norwood "Pony" Poindexter (February 8, 1926 – April 14, 1988) was an American jazz saxophonist who was born in New Orleans and died in Oakland, California. Poindexter began on clarinet and switched to playing alto and tenor sax.

concerts.label: The Sensation of Music at Newport '61: Jon Hendricks' Evolution of the Blues
Midnight Performance: The Sensation of Music at Newport '61/ Jon Hendricks' Evolution of the Blues

about_quotes.speaker: Annie Ross
about_quotes.evidence: He was wonderful to work with. We had a great time... That was the best time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Annie Ross — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: There was an alto saxophonist named Pony Poindexter. Have you heard of him?
